shadcn-html / empty-state

CSS Only

Empty State

A placeholder for when there is no data to display. Includes icon, title, description, and optional actions.

Basic

Simple empty state with icon, title, and description.

No documents

You haven't created any documents yet. Get started by creating your first one.

<div class="empty-state">
  <div class="empty-state-icon">
    <svg>...</svg>
  </div>
  <h3 class="empty-state-title">No documents</h3>
  <p class="empty-state-description">Description text.</p>
</div>

With Action

Empty state with a call-to-action button.

No results found

Try adjusting your search or filter to find what you're looking for.

<div class="empty-state">
  <div class="empty-state-icon"><svg>...</svg></div>
  <h3 class="empty-state-title">No results found</h3>
  <p class="empty-state-description">Description...</p>
  <div class="empty-state-actions">
    <button class="btn" data-variant="outline">Clear</button>
    <button class="btn" data-variant="default">New search</button>
  </div>
</div>

Full specification → components/empty-state/empty-state.md
